title: Garden Route warned of possible heavy rainfall
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS -  The Garden Route and Overberg districts may experience possible heavy rainfall this weekend. This is according to a notice issued by the South African Weather Service (Saws) today, 6 February, valid until Sunday 8 February.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Garden Route and Overberg districts may experience possible heavy rainfall this weekend. This is according to a notice issued by the South African Weather Service (Saws) today, 6 February, valid until Sunday 8 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We are expecting a steep upper-air trough on Saturday, which is expected to become a cut-off low pressure system on Sunday,\" reads the notice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This may bring potentially significant rainfall over parts of the Garden Route and Overberg districts.","html":"This may bring potentially significant rainfall over parts of the Garden Route and Overberg districts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, Saws also says weather prediction models are showing contrasting amounts of rainfall in these regions.","html":"However, Saws also says weather prediction models are showing contrasting amounts of rainfall in these regions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Some indicate significant amounts of rain from Saturday until Sunday, while others are predicting less rainfall.","html":"Some indicate significant amounts of rain from Saturday until Sunday, while others are predicting less rainfall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are monitoring the system, and if the updated models come into agreement, appropriate warnings will be issued for these areas over the weekend,\" says Saws.","html":"\"We are monitoring the system, and if the updated models come into agreement, appropriate warnings will be issued for these areas over the weekend,\" says Saws."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has advised residents to stay alert for further updates, avoid crossing flooded roads and low-lying areas and prepare for possible localised flooding.","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has advised residents to stay alert for further updates, avoid crossing flooded roads and low-lying areas and prepare for possible localised flooding."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route warned of possible heavy rainfall
